definitions.term: liberty cannot be placed in a hierarchic
definitions.text: The essence of liberty calls for such an approach, and the concept of liberty cannot be placed in a hierarchical list like other concepts, in such a way that we pass over each topic and heading only once.
But whenever liberty lacks an objective and judgeable definition, the very word that is meant to save humanity becomes an instrument of enslavement.

definitions.term: My answer in this book is
definitions.text: My answer in this book is clear: liberty, in its objective form, is nothing other than individual property rights.
When it speaks of Liberty, it does not mean the feeling of release—it means individual property rights.

Dialectic is essentially the same mysticism that, under various outwardly secular rituals in Marxism, produces slaughter, and under more hidden and spiritualized rites demands different forms of sacrifice for the common good.
No school of thought, no theory, no philosophy, no mysticism, and no proposed solution—other than the Theory of Liberty and this book—offers a means of placing a bridle upon artificial intelligence.

When it speaks of Iran, it does not mean an established government, a particular ruling class, ethnic group, language, or ideology—it means the civilizational continuum that can reconcile Liberty and faith within a historical order.

definitions.term: the Iranian nation is redefined around l
definitions.text: In this section, the concept of the Iranian nation is redefined around liberty, property, covenant, justice, faith, and the rejection of servitude.
In Iran, the Left simultaneously refers to communists and to reformists who claim to be liberal; in the United States, it refers to supporters of the Democratic Party.

definitions.term: Iran: The Religious Substrate, Private O
definitions.text: Iran: The Religious Substrate, Private Ownership, and the Barrier Against Communism The reason Iran, despite having an economy that is ninety percent state-controlled, never turned communist, lies in a single factor: the religious substrate of its so
The fact that Iranians have been the most religious nation on earth means they grasped the ultimate challenge of thought before anyone else.

definitions.term: If you understand the power of
definitions.text: If you understand the power of choice and free will, you understand that “the world does not have a pre-written formula and a rigidly deterministic destiny.” Once you grasp this, it means you must now accept responsibility for yourself.
The future is transformed by the power of human free will and choice—determinism, in this sense, is simply another form of disbelief in God.
Justice becomes possible only when the justice of free will and personal property rights is acknowledged .That is the foundation of justice.
Its most objective manifestation is found in our own free will—that is, in our existence and the “narrator” of our mind through which we think and speak.

definitions.term: It means that free will and
definitions.text: It means that free will and property rights are annihilated.

definitions.text: A society’s refusal to accept Tawhid as defined above ultimately results in the preference for the opinions and interests of some people over those of others—and that is contrary to Liberty.

definitions.term: That is why Tawhid is not
definitions.text: That is why Tawhid is not merely a theological proposition; it is the breaking point of dialectics and the beginning of the possibility of Liberty.

Its foundation lies in challenging Monotheism (Tawhid), insofar as they “create money out of nothing” and make human beings indebted on the basis of something that does not yet exist externally — that is, they make them indebted to “nothing.” From th
The Primacy of Liberalism over Democracy This is precisely where Liberalism must take precedence over Democracy.
A democracy without liberalism means that the majority can vote against the minority — and commit crimes legitimately.

definitions.term: Democracy is simply a method of
definitions.text: Democracy is simply a method of decision-making for shared matters—nothing more.
All the socialist and communist thugs and agitators deceitfully tie the concept of liberty to democracy.

According to Hans-Hermann Hoppe’s line of argument, democracy as a political system leads to an increase in time preference—that is, a greater preference for immediate gratification over long-term satisfaction.

definitions.text: Throughout history, you have held the most consistent formal system for individual Property Rights, that is, Religion itself; culturally, you have been among the noblest; and you have stood as the bastion of Liberty.

definitions.text: By abandoning the very idea of Liberty (the consistent formal system of Liberty that is identical with religion itself) and searching for deficient Western models of freedom.

definitions.text: we talk about a consistent formal system of property rights, this is exactly what it means: nothing must remain unowned, for unowned property always ends up becoming the property of the state.
To define the concept of Liberty, He has sent a Consistent Formal System known as Religion.

definitions.term: By “intellect” here we mean reasoning gr
definitions.text: By “intellect” here we mean reasoning grounded in logic and in consistent axiomatic formal systems.

Either we take Liberty and individual property rights as axiomatic principles and present a consistent formal axiomatic system for them that can be mutually agreed upon—this, according to the definition of this book, is religion.

definitions.term: the appearance of a savior in the form o
definitions.text: Yet from the remnants that survive, in my attempt to extract a formal axiomatic system, I have found belief in a single God, free will, and even the concept of the appearance of a savior in the form of the Saoshyant.

In other words, each philosopher of Liberty has constructed his own formal axiomatic system around the concept of Liberty, and when they say “the state is necessary,” they are effectively taking the State as an axiom.

Islam means submission to God; and submission to God, at the social level, means submission to the rights that God has established for His servants.
I call such people pseudo-atheists or God-believing atheists.

definitions.term: It is as if you imagine that
definitions.text: It is as if you imagine that God is speaking through your mouth.
Islam means submission to God; and submission to God, at the social level, means submission to the rights that God has established for His servants.

The late Mohammad Reza Shah Pahlavi once said in a well-known interview, “Islam means the Islam of the Prophet’s first day.” He understood better than anyone that something fundamental had gone wrong—though the original foundation remained sound.
Islam means submission to God.
Within the Islamic tradition, the word acquired an even broader semantic range. al-Salām is one of the divine names of God, and Dār al-Salām denotes the abode of peace and security.

definitions.term: If you have a personal problem
definitions.text: If you have a personal problem with Islam, that is another matter—but reason and argument suggest something different.
Preserving the family means relinquishing certain rights, certain opportunities, and certain immediate pleasures in order to gain certain long-term benefits and satisfactions.
Here, “family” or “marriage” does not refer merely to a building, an office, or a particular group; rather, it refers to a system of social rules and expectations.

definitions.term: a child is removed from the ownership of
definitions.text: Once the concept of a child is removed from the ownership of the family, the institution of the family itself naturally loses its meaning.
The destruction of the family institution means a stronger perceived necessity for the existence of the satanic state.

For this reason, the property of the individual, the family, and the descendants of the family must not fall into the hands of a state that is, by its very nature, structured around increasing immediate pleasure and reducing long-term satisfaction (r
State science is essentially the very film The Matrix.

definitions.term: This is why I insist that the

Without such grounding, the scientifically trained socialist uses science to control others, putting himself in a position higher than God—and that is dangerous.
Politics means the science of using coercion and force.

As we have already seen, “science” has offered no consistent theoretical (axiomatic formal-systemic) framework for the concept of liberty, just as religion has offered no theory for performing brain surgery.

definitions.text: And yet this is precisely what dialecticians do.
